ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "postalcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the location is situated */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Neighbourhood where the location is situated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_postalcode FOREIGN KEY ("postalcode") REFERENCES postalcode ("postalcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "postalcode" (
  "postalcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "postalcode" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "postalcode_type" TEXT /* Type of postal code (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the postal code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province associated with the postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the postal code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the postal code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the postal code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postalcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough where the neighbourhood is situated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighbourhood */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the neighbourhood in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighbourhood was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighbourhood was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighbourhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of coordinates */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the coordinates are situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coordinates were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coordinates were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_coordinates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery route */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the route starts */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery route */,
  "route_length_km" REAL /* Length of the delivery route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for delivery */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_routes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery route the package is assigned to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "package_description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the package in kilograms */,
  "volume_cm3" REAL /* Volume of the package in cubic centimeters */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES delivery_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package status */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the status is assigned to */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the package status (e.g., delivered, pending) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the package status */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_status_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics manager, delivery personnel) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role FOREIGN KEY ("user_role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route history event */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery route */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the route was updated */,
  "history_description" TEXT /* Description of the route update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES delivery_routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package history event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was updated */,
  "history_description" TEXT /* Description of the package update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_history_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer history event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer was updated */,
  "history_description" TEXT /* Description of the customer update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
